description: CompositionMulti-colour checked t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with complete front placket and same fabric buttons, mildly puffed short sleeves with smocked hems and rounded hemline with elasticated side endsFittingComfortWash care Hand wash in cold water Do not machine wash Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring Do not tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron Do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Designed for that casual feminine look, this navy blue, green, maroon, white and yellow checked t-shirt looks all the more stylish with the smocked sleeve hems and unbuttoned collar. The fabric buttons along the placket and elasticated side ends add to the smart look. Team this with jeans or skirts and ballerina flats or floaters for a cool casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
